phases.title: NMMC 2026 Official Notification
phases.description: The State Election Commission officially announces the Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC) elections. Model Code of Conduct comes into effect.
voter_actions: Check if your name is in the draft electoral roll
Visit the NMMC office for ward maps

phases.title: Last Date for Voter Correction
phases.description: Final chance to update your address in Seawoods, Kharghar, or Belapur wards. Aadhar-Voter ID linking is highly recommended.

phases.title: Ward-Level Campaigning
phases.description: Candidates from various parties hold 'Padyatras' and corner meetings across Navi Mumbai. Watch out for noise-pollution regulations.
voter_actions: Check candidate criminal antecedents on KYC app

phases.title: Voter Slip Distribution
phases.description: Booth Level Officers (BLOs) visit homes in Seawoods to distribute official Voter Information Slips containing your booth details.
voter_actions: Check the exact booth location in your sector

phases.title: Navi Mumbai Election Day
phases.description: Polling booths open at 7:00 AM across all NMMC schools and community centers. Vote early to avoid the summer heat!
voter_actions: Carry your Voter ID or Aadhar
Cast your ballot at the assigned booth

phases.title: Counting Day at Vashi
phases.description: Votes are counted at the centralized counting center in Vashi. Real-time updates are provided on the NMMC Election Portal.
voter_actions: Avoid gathering in large crowds near counting centers
